posts.author: Adarsh_Patil
posts.text: Nifty Margin Calculation today — Hey, Didnt see anything abnormal in margin today. It’s normal behaviour. I don’t think it will become completely zero. Since tomorrow is expiry, if the contract is deep OTM, the exchange tends to reduce the hedge benefit, especially in a down trending market, so it seems fair enough. And yes, when you sell the hedge, margin will go up because whatever little benefit you were getting will also be removed.

posts.author: dcd
posts.text: Nifty Margin Calculation today — Hi all, Has anyone else felt that the Nifty margins were off today, especially with hedges? I had bought ~4550 qty of Nifty CE 26000 (12 May expiry) as a hedge for my short calls, and they were giving a margin benefit of Rs. 12L as on Friday, But today they were giving 0 benefit (even before market open) And when I sold them, my margin actually went up by a Lakh approx. Is it even possible?
